title: Michelle Cash
compiled_truth: Michelle Cash is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-06), Michelle Cash sent 1785 and received 1401 emails, totalling 3186 interactions. Top correspondents: [Twanda Sweet](people/twanda-sweet) (314), [Fmackin](people/fmackin-aol) (102), [David Oxley](people/david-oxley) (88), [Kriste Sullivan](people/kriste-sullivan) (78), [Fran Mayes](people/fran-mayes) (72). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, deleted_items, inbox, ofccp_audit, personal, sent.
